brand.name: PAIRO
brand.description: Experience the ultimate warmth and luxury with Pairo's handcrafted shearling jackets. Built for comfort, designed for style.

slides.title: ELITE SHEARLING COLLECTION
slides.subtitle: Discover the pinnacle of winter luxury with our handcrafted shearling jackets, meticulously designed for the modern individual.

slides.title: TIMELESS FEMININE ELEGANCE
slides.subtitle: Experience unparalleled warmth and sophisticated silhouettes with our exclusive women's shearling outerwear.

slides.title: THE HERITAGE COAT SERIES
slides.subtitle: Classic longline designs that stand the test of time, crafted from the finest double-faced sheepskin.

newArrivals.name: Classic Aviator Shearling Jacket
newArrivals.details: The Classic Aviator is our hallmark piece. It features a heavy-duty brass zipper, reinforced seams, and a plush shearling collar that provides extreme insulation. Handcrafted in our London studio using traditional methods.

faqs.q: How do I clean this jacket?
faqs.a: We recommend professional leather cleaning only. Avoid getting the shearling wet.
It is water-resistant, but not fully waterproof. We suggest using a protective spray.

newArrivals.name: Women's Oversized Biker Shearling
newArrivals.details: A contemporary take on the classic biker silhouette. This oversized piece offers unparalleled warmth and a bold, editorial look. Features asymmetric zip closure and buckled waist detail.

faqs.a: This is an oversized fit. If you prefer a more tailored look, we recommend sizing down.
Yes, it features one internal security pocket for your essentials.

newArrivals.name: Longline Shearling Overcoat
newArrivals.details: The ultimate expression of winter luxury. Our longline overcoat is crafted from double-faced sheepskin, providing a lightweight yet incredibly warm experience. Perfect for formal and casual occasions alike.

faqs.a: The coat falls just below the knee for an average height of 5'10".
While beautifully finished on both sides, it is designed to be worn leather-side out.

newArrivals.name: Suede B3 Bomber Jacket
newArrivals.details: A lighter-weight bomber with a suede finish. The B3 inspired design features contrasting shearling trim and a comfortable, relaxed fit. Ideal for transitional weather.

faqs.q: How do I maintain the suede?
faqs.a: Use a suede brush regularly to remove dust and keep the nap looking fresh.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for extreme cold?
faqs.a: It is comfortable down to -5°C. For colder climates, we recommend our Aviator series.

topSelling.name: Elite Leather Trench Coat
topSelling.details: Crafted from premium full-grain leather with a subtle sheen. This trench coat offers a modern silhouette with classic details like epaulettes and a waist belt. A true investment piece.

faqs.a: Due to the high-quality leather, it has a substantial feel but is balanced for all-day wear.

faqs.q: Can I wear it in the rain?
faqs.a: It is naturally water-repellent, but we recommend avoiding heavy downpours.

topSelling.name: Black Diamond Shearling
topSelling.details: Our most exclusive shearling jacket. The Black Diamond series uses the highest density wool for absolute warmth. Features matte black hardware and reinforced elbow patches.

faqs.a: It uses a rare selection of pelts that are thicker and more consistent than standard runs.
Yes, we use gunmetal-plated brass that is resistant to corrosion.

topSelling.name: Double-Faced Sheepskin Jacket
topSelling.details: A versatile everyday piece. The double-faced construction allows for a slim profile without sacrificing insulation. Features a high collar and deep hand-warmer pockets.

faqs.a: Yes, this model follows standard European sizing.
Yes, they are lined with soft fleece for extra warmth.

topSelling.name: Vintage Shearling Vest
topSelling.details: A heritage-inspired vest perfect for layering. Features raw-edge finishes and traditional toggle closures. Adds a rugged, pioneer feel to any outfit.

faqs.q: Can I wear it under a coat?
faqs.a: Yes, it is designed with a low-profile armhole for comfortable layering.
100%. We never use synthetic or faux materials.

productDetails.commonDescription: Our premium shearling jackets are handcrafted using the finest ethically sourced sheepskin. Designed to provide maximum warmth in sub-zero temperatures while maintaining a sophisticated, high-fashion silhouette.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: The warmth of this shearling is unmatched. I've worn it in -10°C weather and felt perfectly comfortable. The craftsmanship is world-class.

reviews.name: Elena S.
reviews.text: Finally found a shearling jacket that doesn't feel bulky. The cut is so elegant, and the leather quality is buttery soft. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Pairo jackets are a statement piece. Everywhere I go, I get compliments. Fast shipping and premium packaging too.

posts.title: The Silent Art of Shearling Craftsmanship

posts.title: Pairo Series: The Evolution of the B3 Bomber
posts.excerpt: Tracing the history of the most iconic flight jacket ever made and how Pairo reimagined it for the modern pioneer.

hero.title: Quality Jackets Made to Last
hero.subtitle: We make handmade shearling jackets with a focus on comfort and high-quality materials.
hero.label: Founded in 1994

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Traditional Methods, Modern Style.
story.description: We don't just make jackets; we focus on every detail. Every stitch is carefully placed, and every material is hand-picked. Our process is simple: we take our time to make things right.

features.title: Materials
features.desc: Highest grade double-faced shearling from prestigious Spanish and Italian tanneries.

features.title: Handmade
features.desc: Hand-cut and hand-sewn by master artisans with decades of experience.

promise.label: Our Commitment
promise.title: Our Promise
promise.description: A jacket from our studio is built to last. We stand by our work and offer services to keep your jacket in great condition for years to come.

items.title: Free Repairs
items.desc: We offer free repair services for life. We make sure your jacket stays in perfect shape so you can wear it for a long time.

items.title: Fair Sourcing
items.desc: We only use materials from tanneries that follow strict environmental and animal welfare rules.

hero.label: Customer Support
hero.title: Get in Touch with Our Team
hero.subtitle: We are here to help with your questions about sizing, orders, or custom jackets.
